    ImpedanceDerivator - Class in lcr.util
    Utility calculator processing secondary complex electrical parameters derived from primary Impedance (Z) magnitude and Reactance (X) metrics under dynamic AC test frequencies.
    ImpedanceDerivator() - Constructor for class lcr.util.ImpedanceDerivator
     
    InductanceDerivator - Class in lcr.util
    Utility calculator processing secondary complex electrical parameters derived from primary Inductance (L) and Quality Factor (Q) metrics under dynamic AC test frequencies.
    InductanceDerivator() - Constructor for class lcr.util.InductanceDerivator
     
    InfoPanel - Class in gui
    Horizontal dashboard header that displays current meter configurations using the high-contrast, dark-tech aesthetic of the MeasurementPanel.
